findings.description: The URL 'https://fintan.jp/page/252/' appears in official_doc_urls but has no basis in the source file. The source file lists only one reference URL: https://nablarch.github.io/docs/5u17/doc/application_framework/application_framework/handlers/web/csrf_token_verification_handler.html
findings.source_evidence: 参照先列: https://nablarch.github.io/docs/5u17/doc/application_framework/application_framework/handlers/web/csrf_token_verification_handler.html — no fintan.jp URL appears anywhere in the source
